domain_definitions.active_user: A user who logged in within the last 30 days unless a query overrides the definition.
domain_definitions.revenue: Sum of completed order amounts from the authoritative transactions table.
domain_definitions.support_ticket_volume: Count of support tickets per entity over the selected time window.

domain_definitions.support_ticket_volume: Count of support tickets per entity over the selected time window.
